title: Senior Business Development Manager at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners:
Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners!
